findings.one_line: The pathwise-derivative formula is not reproduced from the declared DAG alone: it appeals to the Hess/Frauen baseline EIF, Firpo inverse-CDF differentiation, and Milgrom-Segal envelope reasoning without encoding those results as dependencies or accepted substrate gates.

The stated nuisance-rate assumptions do not by themselves yield uniform convergence of the empirical coupled objective or graphical convergence of the estimated jointly feasible class, so plug-in consistency of `Chat_a_plus` is not discharged as written.

Because the EIF decomposition still relies on undeclared external results and the empirical optimizer consistency step is not yet proved, the conjecture's claimed pathwise-differentiability/EIF-plus-consistency package remains only partially discharged on the current core.
